headline: ROTATION CONFIRMATION. T3 staleness rotation. Live composite 81.4 (Exemplary band). Strong climate leadership (~100% renewable grid); Comprehensive Migration Policy 2024-2034 explicitly recognizes climate-induced displacement and uses humanitarian-reasons category to protect irregular migrants from disasters; Fourth UNFCCC Communication submitted; National Adaptation Plan 2022-2026 approved; long history of leadership on environment-and-human-rights. State Department: 'no significant changes... no credible reports of significant abuses.' No discrete in-window April 14-28 event. Confirmation appropriate. Confidence MEDIUM (raised from low) given the quality of climate/migration evidence available.

evidence.source: UN Migration Network — Costa Rica Comprehensive Migration Policy 2024-2034
evidence.finding: Recognizes migration/displacement as climate-change outcome; humanitarian-reasons category protects thousands of irregular migrants in disaster contexts.

evidence.source: State Dept Costa Rica 2024 Human Rights Report
evidence.finding: No significant changes in human rights situation; no credible reports of significant human rights abuses.
100% renewable grid; decarbonization focus; green diplomatic identity.
